meta.ogDescriptionPreview: Easy-to-use bioinformatics app for determining the effect of genetic variants. Provides information about the effect of DNA variants in genes, regulatory regions, transcripts and protein sequences.

source: in-app browser sequencing.com marketplace detail page rendered DOM/meta extraction
summaryPreview: Determine the effect of genetic variants on genes, regulatory regions, transcripts, and protein sequences for WGS and exome data.
title: Variant Effect Predictor
visibleParagraphs: Determine the effect of genetic variants.
The Variant Effect Predictor app provides information about the effect of genetic variants on genes, regulatory regions, transcripts and protein sequences.
It is designed for whole genome sequencing and exome sequencing data.
No generated variant-effect table, sample report file, or user genome output was exposed during capture.
